raw_consumer_statement:
I applied for a Citi business credit card and did not receive or activate the physical card until late XX/XX/year>. I did not have possession of the card at any time during XXXX or early XX/XX/year>. 

Between XX/XX/year> and XX/XX/year>, 16 unauthorized retail transactions were posted to the account, before I had received or activated the card. These charges were not authorized by me and total {$1500.00} : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  XXXX immediately reported these charges as fraudulent and clearly stated that I did not have possession of the card at the time of the transactions. Citi has repeatedly stated that I informed them I was in possession of the card when the charges occurred. That statement is false. I never said that, and I did not have the card. 

I have made extensive efforts to resolve this issue, including : Sending an email to the Citi fraud address provided to me Calling Citi at least a dozen times Sending a certified letter, which Citi claims they did not receive, despite my having the USPS return receipt proving delivery ( The letter they received is attached to this complaint ).

Despite these efforts, Citi continues to classify the fraudulent charges as customer responsible and has not corrected its records or properly investigated the fraud. I have also filed a police report documenting the unauthorized transactions.

I am requesting CFPB assistance to require Citi to correct the inaccurate claim that I had possession of the card, properly investigate the fraud, and remove my responsibility for these unauthorized charges.
